title: KM to Miles Converter
shortDescription: Convert kilometers to miles with a standard conversion factor and clear results.
metaDescription: Convert kilometers to miles using the standard factor 1 km = 0.621371 miles. Ideal for trips, runs, and distance planning.
intro: Enter a distance in kilometers and get the equivalent in miles using the standard factor 1 km = 0.621371 miles.
overview:
This converter turns kilometer values into miles so you can read distances in the unit you need. It is useful when a route, race, map, or vehicle trip is given in kilometers and you want the imperial equivalent without doing the math yourself.

The result is based on the standard kilometer-to-mile relationship, so it works for decimal values, large distances, and precise comparisons. If you are checking travel plans, training logs, or distance labels, this tool keeps the conversion straightforward and easy to read.
howItWorks: The tool multiplies the value by 0.621371.
Read the result in miles and, if needed, compare it with another distance.

useCases.description: Turn kilometer figures into miles for summaries, client documents, or data tables.

faq.question: What formula does this converter use?
faq.answer: It uses the standard conversion factor: 1 kilometer = 0.621371 miles.

faq.question: Can I enter decimal kilometers?
faq.answer: Yes. Values such as 2.5 km or 42.195 km are converted directly.

faq.question: Why do I see many decimal places?
faq.answer: The tool shows a precise converted value. You can round it to the level your task needs.

faq.question: What is a frequent mistake when converting km to miles?
faq.answer: A common mistake is multiplying by 1.6 instead of by 0.621371. That reverses the direction of the conversion.

faq.question: Does this tool convert miles back to kilometers?
faq.answer: No. This page is only for kilometers to miles. Use the reverse converter for miles to km.
